pattern: Count how many query strings are contained in a target by testing substring membership for each one.
hints: Each pattern is independent; you only need to know whether it sits somewhere inside the word.
A direct substring containment test per pattern is enough given the small sizes.
Initialize a counter, check `pattern in word` for every pattern, and increment when true.

edge_inputs.description: mix of present and absent patterns
single characters against a long word
pattern equal to the entire word
pattern longer than the word can never match

stress.description: many random patterns over a small alphabet against a random word so some match and some do not
stress.note: guaranteed substrings plus random strings exercise both branches
